description_long: This is a single-story modern house surrounded by dense, mature trees forming a natural privacy barrier on all sides. The house features a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, with a central main structure and two side wings. A paved walkway leads to the main entrance, which is set back from the tree line and opens onto a small front patio. To one side of the house, there is a visible outdoor pool area with a paved deck, suggesting recreational amenities. The property is set on a large, flat grassy plot, and a tall, slender chimney or utility pole stands near one corner, possibly indicating a fireplace or utility feature. The overall design emphasizes privacy, clean lines, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by dense trees and featuring a pool and paved walkways on a large grassy lot.
description_view_0: The house is partially obscured by trees, with the roof and some paved areas visible; the dense tree line dominates the foreground.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the rectangular layout, with the house nestled within a thick perimeter of trees and a glimpse of the pool area.
description_view_2: The front of the house is visible, showing the main entrance, paved walkway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees framing the property.
description_view_3: The rear or side of the house is shown, with the tree barrier enclosing the property and the tall chimney or utility pole visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a paved walkway, small front patio, and minimal overhang, framed by trees for privacy
